analysis.object: T421: Navier-Stokes Euler Equations Comparison depth analysis

euler_regularity.description: Euler regularity open in 3D; harder than NS
euler_regularity.reason: no viscosity = no EML-2 damping term

ns_viscosity.description: NS adds viscosity nu*Δu: EML-2 damping

beale_kato_majda.description: BKM for Euler: same vorticity criterion

euler_harder.description: Euler is strictly harder than NS: no EML-2 stabilizer
euler_harder.reason: removing EML-2 term makes EML-inf harder

euler_ns_comparison.description: T421: Euler is strictly harder than NS; viscosity = EML-2 stabilizer; removing it makes EML-inf obstacle worse
